description:
THE YOUTUBE FOREST: The idea for this film was super simple: make a video that says ‘all money from this video will go to planting trees’, then take that money- as promised, and plant trees. This film is the follow up film where the money has been raised and the trees get planted. A bunch of people, most of which I’ve never met, plant a bunch of trees. It is, I have to say, a super satisfying project- turning my YouTube audience into a force for good. 

--

Goodonya’s for planting 1802 Trees!

Adel from CEC nursery Pakenham
Park Lane Nursery Wangaratta
Jade, Charlie and Minnie from Blackbarn Farm 
Mum and Mos
Heath from Strating & Son
Jindivick and Neerim District Landcare groups
Helen for the bbq
Kelly for bringing Angus
Gippsland Water
Google/YouTube
